---
title: "Schedule"
author: "Davi Moreira"
editor: visual
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .overflow-table {
    font-size: 0.85rem; /* Smaller font for compact display */
    width: 100%; /* Ensure the table fits within page width */
    line-height: 1.2; /* Tighter line spacing */
  }
  .overflow-table th, .overflow-table td {
    padding: 0.3rem; /* Reduce padding for compact layout */
    text-align: left; /* Left-align for readability */
    word-wrap: break-word; /* Wrap long text within cells */
    vertical-align: top; /* Align cell content to the top */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(1), .overflow-table td:nth-child(1) {
    width: 4%; /* Week column */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(2), .overflow-table td:nth-child(2) {
    width: 8%; /* Date column */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(3), .overflow-table td:nth-child(3) {
    width: 9%; /* Mode column */
  }
  .below-table {
    font-size: 0.85rem; /* Match the font size of the table */
    line-height: 1.2; /* Match line height */
    margin-top: 1rem; /* Add spacing above the text */
  }
</style>
```

# Course Schedule

**Fall 2026 — Monday / Wednesday / Friday.** The same 21-notebook arc is paced across the full semester. Course content completes by **Oct 21**, the **Undergraduate Research Conference poster presentation is Tue Nov 17** (all students present), and the **Poster-to-Product** build sprint runs through early December.

**Mode key.** *In person* = we meet in class. *Online (async)* = no live meeting — watch the recorded micro-videos and work the notebook on your own that day. *Studio* = a working session (project/poster/sprint). A few sessions are intentionally online around instructor travel (Oct 2), Fall Break (Oct 9 & 14), and Thanksgiving (Nov 23).

::: overflow-table
| Wk | Date | Mode | Topic / Notebook | Assessment / Milestone |
|----|------|------|------------------|------------------------|
| 1 | Mon Aug 24 | In person | Course launch + Launchpad (setup, Colab, Gemini, AI policy, Kaggle launch, Poster-to-Product preview) — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb00_launchpad_course_setup_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Colab Readiness Check |
| 1 | Wed Aug 26 | In person | Predictive analytics fundamentals, EDA, and data splitting — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb01_eda_splits_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz |
| 1 | Fri Aug 28 | In person | Data setup and preprocessing pipelines — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb02_preprocessing_pipelines_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation |
| 2 | Mon Aug 31 | In person | Regression metrics and baseline modeling — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb03_regression_metrics_baselines_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>3-sentence Evaluation Note |
| 2 | Wed Sep 2 | In person | Linear regression: features, interactions, diagnostics — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb04_linear_features_diagnostics_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation |
| 2 | Fri Sep 4 | **Lecture (in person)** | **Regularization — Ridge & Lasso** + Project proposal — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb05_regularization_project_proposal_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>**MILESTONE 1: Proposal + Dataset** |
| 3 | Mon Sep 7 | — | *No class — Labor Day* | — |
| 3 | Wed Sep 9 | In person | Logistic regression: probabilities, boundaries, pipelines — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb06_logistic_pipelines_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation |
| 3 | Fri Sep 11 | In person | Classification metrics: confusion matrix, ROC/PR, business costs — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb07_classification_metrics_thresholding_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Threshold Recommendation |
| 4 | Mon Sep 14 | In person | Resampling and cross-validation (k-fold + Student's *t* CIs) — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb08_cross_validation_model_comparison_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation |
| 4 | Wed Sep 16 | In person | Hyperparameter tuning + feature engineering + leakage detection — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb09_tuning_feature_engineering_project_baseline_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Project Baseline Draft |
| 4 | Fri Sep 18 | Studio (in person) | Project studio + midterm review | **MILESTONE 2: Baseline Model + Evaluation Plan** |
| 5 | Mon Sep 21 | Online (async) | Midterm casebook self-review (no lecture) — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb10_midterm_casebook_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Midterm prep |
| 5 | Wed Sep 23 | **Exam (in person)** | **MIDTERM EXAM — in person, in class** | **MIDTERM (graded)** |
| 5 | Fri Sep 25 | In person | Decision trees: interpretable models with sharp edges — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb11_decision_trees_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation |
| 6 | Mon Sep 28 | In person | Random forests: bagging, OOB, feature importance — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb12_random_forests_importance_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation |
| 6 | Wed Sep 30 | In person | Gradient boosting: performance with discipline — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb13_gradient_boosting_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation |
| 6 | Fri Oct 2 | **Online (async)** | Project studio + watch-ahead *(instructor travel — Chicago)* | Project work |
| 7 | Mon Oct 5 | In person | Model selection + test-set ceremony + monitoring — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb14_model_selection_protocol_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Participation |
| 7 | Wed Oct 7 | Studio (in person) | Milestone 03 walkthrough (no lecture) — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb15_milestone_03_walkthrough_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Project studio |
| 7 | Fri Oct 9 | **Online (async)** | Time-series forecasting (recorded videos + notebook) — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb16_time_series_forecasting_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>**MILESTONE 3: Complex Model + Tuning + Draft Abstract + `champion_pipeline.joblib`** |
| 8 | Mon Oct 12 | — | *No class — Fall Break* | — |
| 8 | Wed Oct 14 | **Online (async)** | Data communication & poster design (recorded videos + notebook) — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb17_data_communication_poster_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Draft Poster Outline + Abstract |
| 8 | Fri Oct 16 | In person | Competition workflow: notebook to Kaggle submission — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb18_competition_workflow_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | submission.csv to Kaggle |
| 9 | Mon Oct 19 | In person | Deep learning (PyTorch + when-to-use + LLM lab) — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb19_deep_learning_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz<br>Four-Question Rubric |
| 9 | Wed Oct 21 | Online (async) | Course wrap / reflection bridge (no lecture) — **content complete** — [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb20_final_submission_peer_review_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Reflection bridge |
| 9 | Fri Oct 23 | Studio (in person) | Poster studio — build poster from M3 results | Poster build |
| 10 | Mon Oct 26 | Studio (in person) | Poster studio — figures, narrative, abstract | Poster build |
| 10 | Wed Oct 28 | Studio (in person) | Poster studio — structured peer review | Poster peer review |
| 10 | Fri Oct 30 | Studio (in person) | Poster studio — finalization | Poster draft complete |
| 11 | Mon Nov 2 | Studio (in person) | Poster polish + Kaggle leaderboard push | Kaggle push |
| 11 | Wed Nov 4 | Studio (in person) | Dry-run presentations | Presentation practice |
| 11 | Fri Nov 6 | Studio (in person) | Final poster QA | Poster QA |
| 12 | Mon Nov 9 | Studio (in person) | Final poster QA → submission | **POSTER DUE Tue Nov 10** (7 days before URC) |
| 12 | Wed Nov 11 | Studio (in person) | Presentation practice | Presentation practice |
| 12 | Fri Nov 13 | Studio (in person) | Logistics + presentation coaching | Presentation coaching |
| 13 | Mon Nov 16 | Studio (in person) | Final presentation prep | Presentation prep |
| 13 | **Tue Nov 17** | **Conference** | **Undergraduate Research Conference — Poster Presentation (all students present)** | **POSTER PRESENTATION** |
| 13 | Wed Nov 18 | Build sprint (in person) | Poster-to-Product kickoff — scoping, partner framing, AI-assistant assignment | P2P scope |
| 13 | Fri Nov 20 | Build sprint (in person) | Poster-to-Product — data engineering + model validation | P2P build |
| 14 | Mon Nov 23 | **Online (async)** | **Course Case Competition — finalize & conclude** *(before Thanksgiving)* | **KAGGLE final submission** + `NN_kaggle_code.ipynb` (deadline 11:59 PM) |
| 14 | Wed Nov 25 | — | *No class — Thanksgiving vacation* | — |
| 14 | Fri Nov 27 | — | *No class — Thanksgiving vacation* | — |
| 15 | Mon Nov 30 | Build sprint (in person) | Poster-to-Product — deployment + partner checkpoint | P2P deploy |
| 15 | Wed Dec 2 | Build sprint (in person) | Poster-to-Product — usability testing + iteration | P2P usability |
| 15 | Fri Dec 4 | Build sprint (in person) | Poster-to-Product — executive brief drafting | P2P brief |
| 16 | Mon Dec 7 | Build sprint (in person) | Poster-to-Product — showcase preparation | Showcase prep |
| 16 | Wed Dec 9 | Showcase (in person) | **Poster-to-Product SHOWCASE** (partners + feedback) | **P2P SHOWCASE** |
| 16 | Fri Dec 11 | In person | Course wrap — peer evaluation, reflection survey | **Intra-group Peer Evaluation**<br>**REFLECTION SURVEY** (required for completion) |

:::

::: below-table

## Core Course References

- **James, Witten, Hastie, Tibshirani.** *An Introduction to Statistical Learning* (ISLP) + Python labs. Download: [https://www.statlearning.com/](https://www.statlearning.com/){target="_blank"}
- **Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman.** *The Elements of Statistical Learning* (ESL).
- **Provost, Fawcett.** *Data Science for Business*.
- **Pedregosa et al.** "Scikit-learn: Machine Learning in Python." *JMLR*.
- **scikit-learn User Guide** (pipelines, preprocessing, model selection, metrics, inspection).
- **Chip Huyen.** *Designing Machine Learning Systems* (deployment thinking, monitoring).

:::
